response:
TEMPERATURE RISES FAST AS SUN SHINES.
SUMMER WINDS BLOW STRONG AND FAST.
SAND SHINES BRIGHT AS SUN SHINES.
STARS SHINE BRIGHT IN SKY ABOVE.
SEAS SURGE HIGH AS WAVES CRASH.
SUN SETS SLOW AS SKY DIMS.
SHADOWS STRETCH LONG AS NIGHT FALLS.
STARS SPARKLE BRIGHT IN DARK SKY.
SILENT SEAS SLEEP AS MOON RISES.
SUN SHINES BRIGHT ON SANDY BEACH.
WINDS SWIRL FAST AS STORMS ROLL.
WATER ROLL FAST AS WAVES CRASH.
